title: Mod Management
description: Player installs, enables, disables, and removes mods; Steam Workshop mod sharing and browsing

actors.name: Player
actors.description: Game user interacting with ModsDialog UI

actors.name: SteamPlatform
actors.description: Steam Workshop via SWorkshop / SteamUGC API

actors.name: GitHubAPI
actors.description: GitHub REST API and raw content CDN used for mod downloads

actors.name: ModsSystem
actors.description: mindustry.mod.Mods — manages list, import, remove, enable/disable, reload

actors.name: AnnotationProcessor
actors.description: BaseProcessor / AssetsProcess / LoadRegionProcessor — compile-time code generation for mod asset loading

use_cases.name: Browse Installed Mods
use_cases.details: Lists all mods via mods.list(); shows name, icon, enabled state, version, errors

use_cases.name: Search / Filter Mods
use_cases.entry_point: ModsDialog.setup() → rebuild lambda with Strings.matches(query, item.meta.displayName)
use_cases.details: Text field triggers inline rebuild of mod list pane

use_cases.name: Import Mod from File
use_cases.details: Accepts .zip or .jar; catches moddex error; calls setup() on success

use_cases.name: Import Mod from GitHub
use_cases.details: Queries GitHub API for default branch or language; routes to githubImportJavaMod (JAR) or githubImportBranch (zip); streams download → handleMod() → mods.importMod(file)

use_cases.name: Browse Community Mod Browser
use_cases.details: Fetches modJsonURLs[]; falls back through URL list on failure; parses JSON into Seq<ModListing>; displays grid with lazy icon loading from MindustryMods CDN

use_cases.name: Sort Mod Browser
use_cases.entry_point: rebuildBrowser(): orderDate toggle → sortComparing(lastUpdated) or sortComparing(-stars)
use_cases.details: Toggle between date-sorted and star-sorted listings

use_cases.name: Install Mod from Browser
use_cases.entry_point: Browser listing button '@mods.browser.add' → githubImportMod(mod.repo, mod.hasJava, null)
use_cases.details: Reuses same GitHub import flow; marks mod with setRepo(repo)

use_cases.name: View Mod Releases
use_cases.details: Lists releases; each has 'open release' and 'install' buttons; install calls githubImportMod with specific release tag

use_cases.name: Enable Mod
use_cases.entry_point: ModsDialog installed list: enable button → mods.setEnabled(item, true) → setup()
use_cases.details: Button shows upOpen icon when disabled; sets requiresReload flag

use_cases.name: Disable Mod
use_cases.entry_point: ModsDialog installed list: disable button → mods.setEnabled(item, false) → setup()
use_cases.details: Button shows downOpen icon when enabled; disabled if !item.isSupported()

use_cases.name: Remove Mod
use_cases.entry_point: Installed list trash button (non-Steam) → ui.showConfirm() → mods.removeMod(item) → setup()
use_cases.details: Only shown for non-Steam mods (hasSteamID()==false); confirmation dialog before deletion

use_cases.name: View Mod Details
use_cases.details: Shows name, author, version, description, state details (outdated/blacklisted/unmet deps/content errors); lists unlockable content via content.getContentMap()

use_cases.name: View Mod Content
use_cases.details: Opens content browser for all unlockable content belonging to the mod

use_cases.name: Reload Mods
use_cases.details: Auto-triggered when dialog closes after enable/disable changes

use_cases.name: Import Mod Dependencies
use_cases.details: Fetches mod listing, matches by internalName, calls githubImportMod for each missing dep

use_cases.name: Publish Mod to Steam Workshop
use_cases.entry_point: Installed list export button → platform.publish(item) → SWorkshop.publish(Publishable)
use_cases.details: Only shown if steam==true and !item.hasSteamID(); calls showPublish() → ugc.createItem() → onCreateItem() → update()

use_cases.name: Update Steam Workshop Item
use_cases.entry_point: SWorkshop.viewListing() → dialog '@workshop.update' → SWorkshop.update(p, id, changelog, updateDescription)
use_cases.details: Calls updateItem() → ugc.startItemUpdate() → sets title/desc/tags/preview/content → ugc.submitItemUpdate(); onSubmitItemUpdate redirects to workshop page

use_cases.name: View Steam Workshop Listing
use_cases.entry_point: Installed list link button (hasSteamID) → platform.viewListing(item) → SWorkshop.viewListing(p)
use_cases.details: Queries UGC details; if owner: shows update/view menu; else activates Steam overlay to CommunityFilePage

use_cases.name: Subscribe to Workshop Mod
use_cases.details: Steam triggers on subscription; logs install folder; completes downloadMapWorkshop achievement

use_cases.name: Load Workshop Mods on Startup
use_cases.entry_point: SWorkshop() constructor → ugc.getSubscribedItems() → filters by mod.json/mod.hjson → workshopFiles[LoadedMod]
use_cases.details: Also separates maps and schematics; mod folders added to mod loading pipeline

use_cases.name: Generate Asset Classes at Build Time
use_cases.details: Generates Tex, Icon, Iconc, Sounds, Musics classes; processes @StyleDefaults to register styles

use_cases.name: Generate Content Region Loader at Build Time
use_cases.details: Scans @Load-annotated public fields; generates atlas.find() calls; supports arrays with dimensions and fallback regions

key_relationships: ModsDialog depends_on Mods (mods.importMod, removeMod, setEnabled, reload, list)
ModsDialog depends_on GitHubAPI (Http.get calls to ghApi)
SWorkshop uses LoadedMod, Map, Schematic as Publishable types
AssetsProcess reads core/assets and core/assets-raw at build time
LoadRegionProcessor generates ContentRegions used by mod content loading
important_notes: BaseProcessor/AssetsProcess/LoadRegionProcessor operate at compile-time only and do not participate in runtime mod management. SWorkshop is desktop-only (Steam). Mobile platforms skip folder open buttons. Mod reload is deferred until ModsDialog is closed. GitHub import auto-detects Java vs script mods by language field. Browser fetches community mod list from modJsonURLs[] with fallback chain.
